NOISE ABATEMENT PROCEDURES - TAKE-OFF AND CLIMB PROCEDURES (INCLUDING GO-AROUNDS) AMENDED AS FOLLOWS: ALL LIGHT PROPELLER DRIVEN ACFT WITH A MTWA OF LESS THAN 5700KG, ON DEPARTURE OF EITHER RWY, SHALL NOT COMMENCE A TURN BEFORE PASSING 700FT QNH OR 1.0DME (WHICHEVER FIRST), UNLESS OTHERWISE INSTRUCTED BY ATC. OPERATORS OF ACFT USING THE AD SHALL CONDUCT FLIGHTS IN A MANNER INTENDED TO MINIMISE NOISE DISTURBANCE TO LOCAL COMMUNITIES SURROUNDING THE AD, INSOFAR AS THIS IS OPERATIONALLY AND SAFELY PRACTICABLE. NO ARR OR DEP LATER THAN CLOSING TIMES MINUS 15 MIN. INBD ACFT ARE REQUIRED TO ALLOW SUFFICIENT TIME TO RECEIVE AN ATS AFTER AD REOPENING.
